name: HTS_SCHED_PROFILE_UNITS
description: Table containing list of departments and locations that defines the group to be staffed as part of the schedule generation.

columns.Name: SCHED_PROFILE_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Unique system generated identifier for a schedule profile Units

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SCHED_GEN_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: foreign key to Schedule Generation Profile table

columns.Name: ACTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: This field is also set to the same Active end date when a Schedule Generation Profile becomes inactive in order to eliminate duplicate key restrictions based on department or location for other Schedule Generation Profiles.

columns.Name: SCHED_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: foreign key to Schedule Unit table

columns.Name: DEPARTMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Department defined as staffing department for the schedule generation profile.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Location added to department to define a staffing department for the schedule generation profile.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
